query_title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: A young soprano becomes the obsession of a disfigured and murderous musical genius who lives beneath the Paris Opera House.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: The deformed Phantom who haunts the Paris Opera House causes murder and mayhem in an attempt to make the woman he loves a star.

recommendations.title: Ballerina
recommendations.overview: In 1879 Paris, a young orphan dreams of becoming a ballerina and flees her rural Brittany for Paris, where she passes for someone else and accedes to the position of pupil at the Grand Opera house.

recommendations.title: Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: Following a tragic accident that leaves him disfigured, crazed composer Erique Claudin transformed into a masked phantom who schemes to make beautiful young soprano Christine Dubois the star of the opera and wreak revenge on those who stole his music

recommendations.title: August Rush
recommendations.overview: Lyla and Louis, a singer and a musician, fall in love, but are soon compelled to separate. Lyla is forced to give up her newborn but unknown to her, he grows up to become a musical genius.

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: Pulse
recommendations.overview: Live performance from the legendary band, recorded live at Earls Court in London on 20th October 1994, during The Division Bell tour.

recommendations.title: Farinelli
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

recommendations.title: Marguerite
recommendations.overview: Paris in the 1920s. Marguerite Dumont is a wealthy woman with a passion for music and the opera. For years, she has performed regularly for a circle of guests. But Marguerite sings tragically out of tune and no one has ever told her. Her husband and

recommendations.title: Quadrophenia
recommendations.overview: Based on the 1973 rock opera album of the same name by The Who, this is the story of 60s teenager Jimmy. At work he slaves in a dead-end job. While after, he shops for tailored suits and rides his scooter as part of the London Mod scene.

recommendations.title: A Night at the Opera
recommendations.overview: The Marx Brothers take on high society and the opera world to bring two lovers together. A sly business manager and two wacky friends of two opera singers help them achieve success while humiliating their stuffy and snobbish enemies.
